title: Intensely Savory American Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting plant-based stew featuring the warmth of allspice and the depth of tempering chocolate, cooked to perfection in a claypot.
instructions: Heat the claypot over medium heat, then add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery, cooking until the vegetables are tender.
Add the ground allspice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Add the rinsed lentils, vegetable broth, and tomato paste, stirring to combine, then bringing the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the claypot, and simmer the stew for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Stir the melted chocolate into the stew, then continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
